name: Castorice
desc: Aidonia, the snowy land that respects and worships death, has already sunken into sweet slumber.\nO Castorice, daughter of the River of Souls, the Chrysos Heir in search of the Coreflame of "Death," set forth! Guard the lament of the souls in this world, and embrace the solitude of destiny.\n— Life and death is a journey. When a butterfly rests on that dead branch, the withered will be reborn again.

1.name: Snowbound Maiden, Memory to Tomb
1.desc: When the enemy target's current HP is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max HP or lower, the DMG dealt to it by "Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace," "Claw Splits the Veil," "Breath Scorches the Shadow," and "Wings Sweep the Ruins" is <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG respectively.

2.name: Crown on Wings of Bloom
2.desc: After summoning the memosprite Netherwing, Castorice gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Ardent Will." "Ardent Will" can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and can be used to offset the HP cost of Netherwing's Memosprite Skill, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and <u>advance Castorice's action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. When using the next Enhanced Skill, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

3.name: Pious Pilgrim, Dance in Doom
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Rest in Songs of Gloom
4.desc: While Castorice is on the field, all allies' HP restored when receiving healing increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Pristine Pages, Prophecy as Plume
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Await for Years to Loom
6.desc: When Castorice or Netherwing deals DMG, increases Quantum <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. During Netherwing's attacks, can reduce enemy Toughness regardless of Weakness Types. When breaking Weaknesses, triggers the Quantum Weakness Break effect. And the number of Bounces for Netherwing's Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins" additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

140701.name: Lament, Nethersea's Ripple
140701.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one designated enemy.
140701.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

140702.name: Silence, Wraithfly's Caress
140702.desc: Consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of all allies' current HP. Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one designated enemy and Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.\nIf Netherwing is on the battlefield, the Skill becomes "Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace" instead.
140702.simple_desc: Consumes all allies' HP. Deals Quantum DMG to one enemy and minor Quantum DMG to adjacent targets.

140703.name: Doomshriek, Dawn's Chime
140703.desc: <u>Summons the memosprite</u> Netherwing and <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. At the same time, deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland," which decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>. If Castorice has the DMG Boost effect from her Talent, then this effect spreads to Netherwing. Netherwing has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and a set Max HP equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."\nAfter Netherwing experiences <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns or when its HP is 0, it disappears and dispels the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland."
140703.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Netherwing and <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. At the same time, deploys a <u>Territory</u> that <color=#f29e38ff>decreases All-Type RES</color> for all enemies.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

10000020.name: Territory
10000020.desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

140704.name: Desolation Across Palms
140704.desc: The maximum limit of "Newbud" is related to the levels of all characters on the battlefield. For every 1 point of HP lost by all allies, Castorice gains 1 point of "Newbud." When "Newbud" reaches its maximum limit, can activate the Ultimate. When allies lose HP, Castorice's and Netherwing's DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen Netherwing is on the field, "Newbud" cannot be gained through Talent, and every 1 point of HP lost by all allies (except Netherwing) will be converted to an equal amount of HP for Netherwing.
140704.simple_desc: When allies lose HP, Castorice gains <color=#f29e38ff>"Newbud"</color>. Increases Castorice's and Netherwing's <color=#f29e38ff>DMG dealt</color>. When <color=#f29e38ff>"Newbud"</color> reaches its maximum limit, can activate the Ultimate. While Netherwing is on the field, HP lost by allies (except Netherwing) will be converted to an equal amount of HP for Netherwing.

140706.name: Attack
140706.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140707.name: Wail, Death's Herald
140707.desc: After using Technique, enters the "Netherveil" state that lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> seconds. While "Netherveil" is active, enemies are unable to actively approach Castorice.\nDuring "Netherveil," active attacks will cause all enemies within range to enter combat. At the same time, <u>summons the memosprite</u> Netherwing, <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, and deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland." Netherwing has its current HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud." After entering battle, consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing).\nIf Netherwing is not summoned after entering battle, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."
140707.simple_desc: Enters the "Netherveil" state. Enemies are unable to actively approach Castorice.\nDuring "Netherveil," attacks will cause all enemies within range to enter combat. At the same time, <color=#f29e38ff><u>summons the memosprite</u></color> Netherwing, <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Upon entering battle, consumes HP of all allies (except Netherwing).\nIf Netherwing is not summoned after entering battle, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of max "Newbud."

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

10000020.name: Territory
10000020.desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

140709.name: Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace
140709.desc: Consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing). Castorice and Netherwing launch <u>Joint ATK</u> on the targets, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.\nIf the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.
140709.simple_desc: Consumes all allies' HP. Castorice and Netherwing launch <u>Joint ATK</u> on the targets, dealing Quantum DMG to all enemies.

10000019.name: Joint Attack
10000019.desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

1.point_desc: After ally targets (excluding Netherwing) receive healing, converts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the healed amount into "Newbud." If Netherwing is on the field, this is converted to Netherwing's HP instead. Each ally target can accumulate a conversion amount up to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the max "Newbud." After any unit takes action, all units reset their accumulated conversion amount.

When Castorice's current HP is higher than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of her Max HP, her SPD increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field or brings them to a point where their HP cannot be reduced further, Netherwing's SPD increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for 1 turn.

Each time Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow," the DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasts until the end of this turn.

1140701.name: Claw Splits the Veil
1140701.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.
1140701.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies.

1140702.name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140702.desc: Launching "Breath Scorches the Shadow" will consume <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Netherwing's Max HP to deal Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.\nIn one attack, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" can be launched repeatedly, with the DMG multiplier increased progressively to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> / <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>. After reaching <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, it will not increase further. The DMG Multiplier Boost effect will not decrease before Netherwing disappears.\nWhen Netherwing's current HP is equal to or less than <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its Max HP, launching this ability will actively reduce HP down to 1, and then trigger the ability effect equal to that of the Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."
1140702.simple_desc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140703.name: Mooncocoon Shrouds the Form
1140703.desc: When Netherwing is on the field, it acts as <u>backup</u> for allies. When allies take DMG or consume HP, their current HP can be reduced down to a minimum of 1, after which Netherwing will bear the HP loss. But Netherwing consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original value. This lasts until Netherwing disappears.
1140703.simple_desc: When Netherwing is on the field, it acts as <u>backup</u> for allies. Allies' current HP can be reduced down to a minimum of 1, after which Netherwing will bear the DMG received or the HP consumed.

10000021.name: Backup
10000021.desc: Enemies cannot actively target backup units. Allies' Blast-type abilities cannot Blast to backup units.

1140705.name: Roar Rumbles the Realm
1140705.desc: When Netherwing is summoned, increases DMG dealt by all allies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
1140705.simple_desc: When summoned, increases the DMG dealt by all allies.

1140706.name: Wings Sweep the Ruins
1140706.desc: When Netherwing disappears, deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one random enemy. At the same time, restores HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies.
1140706.simple_desc: Upon disappearing, deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). At the same time, restores HP for all allies.

1140710.name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140710.simple_desc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140711.name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140711.simple_desc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140712.name: Wings Sweep the Ruins
1140712.desc: Consumes all HP and deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one random enemy. At the same time, restores HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies.
1140712.simple_desc: Consumes all HP and deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). At the same time, restores HP for all allies.

140704.name: Sanctuary of Mooncocoon
140704.desc: After obtaining Castorice or when Castorice is in the current team, receive the following effect: In battle, when an ally character receives a killing blow, all ally characters that received a killing blow in this action enter the "Mooncocoon" state. Characters in "Mooncocoon" temporarily delay becoming <u>downed</u> and can take actions normally. After the action and before the start of the next turn, if their current HP increases or they gain a Shield, "Mooncocoon" is removed. Otherwise, they will be <u>downed</u> immediately. This effect can only trigger once per battle.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.
